title: Breakdown and review skill prose
description:
Direct workers to consume the full review report and direct breakdown to ship complete, standards-meeting items.

## Background

Skill prose today does not tell workers to account for every numbered finding before re-requesting review, and breakdown can emit gateless, terse, or untyped items. This is a skill-prose change only; there is no engine require-gates rule.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-10: review-skill prose directs the worker to read the full report and address every numbered finding before re-requesting the gate, and breakdown-skill prose requires output items to carry gates, descriptive titles, and derived types per the content standards.

## Notes

Edit the jit-breakdown skill docs and the review/project-lead skill docs; self-contained.
